title: diplotaxis catholica subvar. genuina
intro: Diplotaxis catholica subvar. genuina, also known as true or wild rocket, is a perennial plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, thanks to its health benefits including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Diplotaxis catholica subvar. genuina can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
